fields.helpText: From Crisp -> Settings -> API Tokens -> Token Identifier

fields.label: Token Key
fields.helpText: From Crisp -> Settings -> API Tokens -> Token Key

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API token via Crisp website list endpoint

metadata.summary: Crisp customer messaging platform for live chat, helpdesk, and knowledge base via the Crisp REST API.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to Crisp.
2. Go to Settings -> API Tokens (or visit app.crisp.chat/settings/token/).
3. Create a new token pair.
4. Copy the Token Identifier and Token Key.
5. Paste both values here.
